summary: Solid bash implementation with proper error handling and good workflow structure. Issues: (1) run-tests.sh has repetitive assertion blocks (lines 112-145) for TC1-TC6 that could consolidate into a loop, reducing ~28 lines to ~10 and easing new test additions; (2) Hardcoded assertions and test case names require modifying harness for each new test; (3) Workflow YAML duplication in test steps is unavoidable (GitHub Actions limitation); (4) actionlint installation check (line 30) is defensive but unnecessary on fresh container. Core script is well-commented and maintainable. Despite issues, deliverable works correctly and demonstrates TDD methodology with working tests and proper CI/CD integration.
